lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਦੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: rehan na paaveh sur nar devaa |
lines.english: The angelic beings and demi-gods are not permitted to remain here.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਠਿ ਸਿਧਾਰੇ ਕਰਿ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਸੇਵਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aootth sidhaare kar mun jan sevaa |1|
lines.english: The silent sages and humble servants also must arise and depart. ||1||
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, they obtain the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤ ਪੇਖੇ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeevat pekhe jinaee har har dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: Only those who meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, are seen to live on.
Mortal beings are entangled, clinging to false worldly attachments.
Kings, emperors and merchants must die.
Whoever is seen shall be consumed by death. ||2||
And when they must leave them behind, then they regret and grieve. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਕਰਹੁ ਦਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: kripaa nidhaan naanak kau karahu daat |
lines.english: O Lord, O treasure of mercy, please bless Nanak with this gift,
You dwell deep within the heart of each and every being.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
The entire universe is strung on Your Thread. ||1||
that he may chant Your Name, day and night. ||4||8||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਹੀ ਪੇਖਿ ਪੇਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਬਿਗਸਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tum hee pekh pekh man bigasaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Beholding You, gazing upon You, my mind blossoms forth. ||1||Pause||
You are my Beloved, the Support of my breath of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਜੋਨਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: anik jon bhram bhram bhram haare |
lines.english: Wandering, wandering, wandering through countless incarnations, I have grown so weary.
You are inaccessible, incomprehensible, invisible and infinite.
Now, I hold tight to the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||2||
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak remembers You in meditation, day and night. ||3||9||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਬਿਨਸਤ ਬਾਰ ਨ ਕਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaa kau binasat baar na kaaee |1|
lines.english: It disappears in no time at all. ||1||
What is the use of the glory of Maya?
In his unconscious state, he clings to it. ||1||Pause||
This is a dream, but the sleeper does not know it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚ ਤੇ ਊਚ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਦਰਬਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aooch te aooch taa kaa darabaaraa |
lines.english: The Royal Court of His Darbaar is the highest of the high.
Gazing upon them, watching them, he must still arise and depart. ||2||
He creates and destroys countless beings. ||3||
The poor fool is enticed by the great attachments of the world.
O Nanak, meditate on the One God. ||4||10||16||
There has never been any other, and there shall never be.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਹਉ ਜੀਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: simar simar taa kau hau jeevaa |
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on Him, I live.
He is my Lord, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਤੇਰੇ ਧੋਇ ਧੋਇ ਪੀਵਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: charan kamal tere dhoe dhoe peevaa |1|
lines.english: I wash Your Lotus Feet, and drink in the wash water. ||1||
Hearing, hearing Your Ambrosial Naam, I meditate on it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa kai sang suaamee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My Lord and Master abides with His humble devotees. ||1||Pause||
Twenty-four hours a day, I sing Your Glorious Praises. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਕਛੁ ਭਉ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai simaran kachh bhau na biaapai |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on Him, fear cannot touch me.
Your Glorious Virtues are infinite, O God, O Lord of supreme bliss. ||3||
Beholding, beholding Your divine play, my mind is in bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan ridai dhiaan dhaaree |
lines.english: Within my heart, I meditate on the Word of the Guru's Teachings.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
Forever and ever, Nanak meditates on the Lord. ||4||11||17||
The image of His vision is fruitful; I am a sacrifice to it.
With my tongue, I chant the Chant of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਮਨ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਅਧਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal man praan adhaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His Lotus Feet are the Support of the mind, the Support of the very breath of life. ||1||Pause||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the cycle of birth and death is ended.
To hear the Ambrosial Sermon is the support of my ears. ||2||
Says Nanak, I have contemplated this essence of reality;
I have enshrined the Naam within myself, with charity, true cleansing and righteous conduct. ||3||
I have renounced sexual desire, anger, greed and emotional attachment.
The sinner is absorbed in greed and emotional attachment.
chanting the Name of the Lord, I am carried across. ||4||12||18||
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
